title: Lucky
album: We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.
why_this_song: Lucky by Jason Mraz (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "I'm lucky I'm in love with my best friend"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ooohh ooooh oooh oooh ooh ooh ooh ooh"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Lucky to be coming home again"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Lucky to be coming home again"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Ooohh ooooh oooh oooh ooh ooh ooh ooh"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Lucky to be coming home again
Ooohh ooooh oooh oooh ooh ooh ooh ooh
They don't know how long it takes
Waiting for a love like this
Lucky to be coming home someday
And so I'm sailing through the sea
To an island where we'll meet
You'll hear the music fill the air

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lucky" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lucky" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "oooh" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "oooh" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Waiting for a love like this
I'll put a flower in your hair

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Lucky we're in love in every way
Move so pretty you're all I see

exercises.prompt_en: "Lucky" was released in 2008. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Lucky" foi lançada em 2008. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Lucky" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Lucky" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
